user.title: Set up Monkeytype
user.description: Generate an ApeKey at monkeytype.com → Account → Ape Keys (scopes: results, leaderboards).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Monkeytype
reauth_confirm.description: Your ApeKey is no longer accepted. Generate a new one at monkeytype.com → Account → Ape Keys and enter it below.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid ApeKey – please check your key
error.ape_key_inactive: ApeKey is inactive – enable it on monkeytype.com → Account → Ape Keys
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Monkeytype API
